----- Original Message ----
From: "PNemcova@AglowProperties.com" <PNemcova@AglowProperties.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>; Jeffrey Epstein <sarah@ellmax.com>
Sent: Monday, January 7, 2008 7:35:30 AM
Subject: Re: Properties in Cape Town

Dear Jeffrey,
Here R the images and infos on the house in Caper town. It is realy nice one and sexi one!
Let me know if U like the look of it and I will get video.

The person is not planing to put it on market, but it looks like that he would probably sell it for 11 milion Euros.

Let me know if U have any questions.

Herewith is the following information level by level: 
  
The house is approximately 1000m2 undercover, including the patio. 
  
Level 1 comprises of:                      Garaging for 5 cars 
                                                                Guards house 
                                                                Storeroom 
                                                                Large entrance Gallery 
  
Level 2 comprises of:                      Two self contained staff quarters both with shower room and cooking facilities. 
                                                                Fully equipped media room. 
  
Level 3 comprises of:                      Gallery 
                                                                Self contained Guest suite en-suite and balcony 
                                                                2 Storerooms 
  
Level 4 comprises of:                      Entertainment Area 
                                                                Bar 
                                                                Pool room 
                                                                Spa 
                                                                Guest loo 
                                                                Storeroom 
                                                                Gazebo 
                                                                Heated pool 
                                                                Entertainment deck suitable for +- 120 people 
  
Level 5 comprises of:                      Lounge / dining room 
                                                                Wine cellar 
                                                                Playroom 
                                                                Study 
                                                                Kitchen with integrated Sneg appliance 
                                                                Scullery 
                                                                Laundry 
                                                                Managers office 
                                                                En-suite Guest suite 
                                                                Guest loo 
  
Level 6 comprises of:                      Main en-suite with small gym 
                                                                2 Guest bedrooms both with en-suite bathrooms 
                                                                T.V Area 
                                                                
                                                                This whole level shuts down with Roller shutters for security 
  
All the bedrooms have Plasma T.Vs 
Level 5 has 6 meter high ceilings 
Levels 4, 5 and 6 has integrated sound system by Creston 
  

Let us light up your life!
Lots of love, light, and happiness,
Petra

Petra Nemcova
Partner

New York, NY 10069
